sentences.target: Il manque un élément dans la recette.

translations.fr: Il manque un élément dans la recette.
translations.en: An element is missing in the recipe.
translations.es: Falta un ingrediente en la receta.
translations.yue: 食譜入面少咗一樣材料。
translations.ru: В рецепте не хватает одного ингредиента.
translations.vi: Công thức đang thiếu một nguyên liệu.
translations.nl: Er ontbreekt een ingrediënt in het recept.
translations.uk: У рецепті не вистачає одного інгредієнта.
translations.hi: रेसिपी में एक सामग्री गायब है.
translations.nb: Det mangler en ingrediens i oppskriften.
translations.id: Ada satu bahan yang kurang dalam resep.
translations.sv: Det saknas en ingrediens i receptet.
translations.da: Der mangler en ingrediens i opskriften.
translations.ja: レシピに材料が一つ足りません。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun used with an impersonal construction to indicate that something is missing.
Main verb in 3rd person singular present; expresses absence/lack.
Indefinite article introducing the noun as a non-specific item.
Common noun; the thing that is missing; in this impersonal structure, it functions as the postverbal subject.
Preposition introducing the location phrase.
Definite article marking a specific noun.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans' indicating the location.

sentences.target: C'est un élément très important pour nous.

translations.fr: C'est un élément très important pour nous.
translations.en: It's a very important element for us.
translations.es: Es un elemento muy importante para nosotros.
translations.de: Das ist ein sehr wichtiger Bestandteil für uns.
translations.it: È un elemento molto importante per noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这是对我们来说非常重要的要素。
translations.yue: 呢個對我哋嚟講係一個好重要嘅要素。
translations.ru: Это очень важный элемент для нас.
translations.pt: É um elemento muito importante para nós.
translations.tr: Bu bizim için çok önemli bir unsur.
translations.vi: Đây là một yếu tố rất quan trọng đối với chúng tôi.
translations.ar: هذا عنصر مهم جدًا بالنسبة لنا.
translations.nl: Dit is een zeer belangrijk onderdeel voor ons.
translations.uk: Це дуже важливий елемент для нас.
translations.hu: Ez egy nagyon fontos elem számunkra.
translations.hi: यह हमारे लिए बहुत महत्वपूर्ण तत्व है.
translations.pl: To jest dla nas bardzo ważny element.
translations.el: Είναι ένα πολύ σημαντικό στοιχείο για εμάς.
translations.nb: Dette er et svært viktig element for oss.
translations.id: Ini adalah elemen yang sangat penting bagi kami.
translations.sv: Det är en mycket viktig del för oss.
translations.ro: Este un element foarte important pentru noi.
translations.cs: Je to pro nás velmi důležitý prvek.
translations.da: Det er et meget vigtigt element for os.
translations.fi: Se on meille erittäin tärkeä osa.
translations.ja: それは私たちにとってとても重要な要素です。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'Ce est'; copular auxiliary linking the subject 'ce' to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article introducing the predicate noun.
Noun serving as the head of the predicate complement after the copula.
Adverb intensifying the adjective that follows.
Adjective modifying 'élément'.
Preposition introducing a benefactive phrase.
Personal pronoun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Tu choisis quel élément pour le projet.
sentences.reading: /ty ʃwazi kɛl elɛmɑ̃ puʁ lə pʁɔʒɛ/

translations.fr: Tu choisis quel élément pour le projet.
translations.ipa: /ty ʃwazi kɛl elɛmɑ̃ puʁ lə pʁɔʒɛ/
translations.en: Which element are you choosing for the project?
translations.es: ¿Qué elemento vas a elegir para el proyecto?
translations.de: Welches Element wählst du für das Projekt?
translations.it: Quale elemento scegli per il progetto?
translations.zh-Hans: 你为这个项目选择哪个要素？
translations.yue: 你會為呢個項目揀邊個元素？
translations.ru: Какой элемент ты выбираешь для проекта?
translations.pt: Qual elemento você está escolhendo para o projeto?
translations.vi: Bạn chọn yếu tố nào cho dự án?
translations.nl: Welk element kies jij voor het project?
translations.uk: Який елемент ти обираєш для проєкту?
translations.hi: तुम परियोजना के लिए कौन सा तत्व चुन रहे हो?
translations.el: Ποιο στοιχείο επιλέγεις για το έργο?
translations.nb: Hvilket element velger du til prosjektet?
translations.id: Elemen mana yang kamu pilih untuk proyek?
translations.sv: Vilket element väljer du till projektet?
translations.cs: Který prvek si vybíráš do projektu?
translations.da: Hvilket element vælger du til projektet?
translations.ja: プロジェクトにはどの要素を選ぶの？

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb in 2nd person singular present; takes a direct object.
Interrogative determiner modifying 'élément' to mark a direct question.
Common noun; direct object of 'choisis'.
Preposition introducing the goal or beneficiary.
Definite article specifying the noun 'projet'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Je cherche un élément pour compléter.

translations.fr: Je cherche un élément pour compléter.
translations.en: I'm looking for an element to complete.
translations.es: Estoy buscando una pieza para completar.
translations.de: Ich suche ein Teil, damit es vollständig wird.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找一个用来补全的部件。
translations.yue: 我搵緊一件部件嚟補上。
translations.pt: Estou procurando uma peça para completar.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một mảnh để hoàn thiện.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een stukje om het af te maken.
translations.hi: मैं पूरा करने के लिए एक हिस्सा खोज रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω ένα κομμάτι για να ολοκληρώσω.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en del for å fullføre.
translations.id: Saya mencari satu bagian untuk melengkapi.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en del för att komplettera.
translations.ro: Caut o piesă ca să completez.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en del for at gøre det færdigt.
translations.ja: 完成させるためのピースを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb in 1st person singular present; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article introducing the direct object.
Common noun; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a purpose clause with an infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'pour' expressing purpose.
